recipe.title: Shrimp Creamy Lemon Garlic Pasta with Caesar Salad
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook linguine until al dente. Reserve ½ cup pasta water before draining.
Meanwhile, heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add shrimp to the skillet in a single layer. Cook until pink, about 2–3 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.
Reduce heat to low. Stir in cream, Parmesan, lemon zest, and lemon juice. Simmer gently until slightly thickened.
Toss drained pasta with the creamy sauce, adding pasta water as needed to reach desired consistency.
Return shrimp to the pan and fold everything together. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
For the Caesar salad: chop romaine, toss with dressing, croutons, and Parmesan.
Serve pasta in bowls with Caesar salad on the side or tossed on top. Garnish with extra Parmesan and a lemon wedge.
